owning_subsystem: shared storage/runtime crates, platform runtime/tooling, and service/workflow non-UI dependencies
non_goals: Do not upgrade the Leptos/browser/Tauri stack in this phase.
Do not move contract or schema ownership out of schemas/.
Do not change the workspace edition in this phase.
Do not bypass shared/surrealdb-access for SurrealDB access.
scope_in: Upgrade non-UI direct dependencies to current stable releases where feasible in this phase.
Upgrade SurrealDB consumers under shared/surrealdb-access and services/knowledge-service.
Upgrade Wasmtime consumers under platform/runtime/strategy-sandbox and dependent workflow tests.
Upgrade wasmCloud/WIT helper dependencies where needed to keep runtime/tooling coherent.
scope_out: Breaking schema/event redesign unless forced by an additive compatibility fix.
acceptance_criteria: The workspace resolves and compiles after the non-UI dependency upgrades.
Focused SurrealDB and Wasmtime consumers pass their test suites.
cargo verify-repo passes without new architectural boundary violations.
rollback_path: Revert the phase-2 manifest and lockfile updates together with the SurrealDB, Wasmtime, and supporting runtime/tooling code changes so the workspace returns to the phase-1 baseline.
